LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS GLOBAL IP SOLUTIONS INC. AND GOOGLE INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DECEMBER 11, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 DUE TO THE RECUSAL OF JUDGE MILLER. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. THE REPLY PAPERS INDICATE THAT AN OPPOSITION WAS FILED AND SERVED. THE COURT'S REGISTER OF ACTION DOES NOT REFLECT THAT AN OPPOSITION WAS EVER FILED, HOWEVER. IN ADDITION, THE COURT DOES NOT HAVE A COURTESY COPY OF ANY OPPOSING PAPERS. THE MATTER IS CONTINUED TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF THE OPPORTUNITY TO FILE THE OPPOSITION AND PROVIDE A COURTESY COPY IN COMPLIANCE WITH 2.6B. PLAINTIFF SHALL PROVIDE A COVER LETTER WITH ITS COURTESY COPY REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE TO DEPARTMENT 302, NO LATER THAN NOVEMBER 16, 2012 AT 4:00 PM, OR THE DEMURRER WILL BE SUSTAINED.
